title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Panchshil Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Panchshil Realty:
Panchshil Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
